mapper.select: select id, vehicle_no, brand, model, color, seat_count, daily_price, status, hot_flag, cover_image, description, created_at, updated_at from vehicle where hot_flag = 1 and status = 'AVAILABLE' order by updated_at desc limit 10
select id, vehicle_no, brand, model, color, seat_count, daily_price, status, hot_flag, cover_image, description, created_at, updated_at from vehicle where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into vehicle (vehicle_no, brand, model, color, seat_count, daily_price, status, hot_flag, cover_image, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{vehicleNo}, #{brand}, #{model}, #{color}, #{seatCount}, #{dailyPrice}, #{status}, #{hotFlag}, #{coverImage}, #{description}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update vehicle set vehicle_no = #{vehicleNo}, brand = #{brand}, model = #{model}, color = #{color}, seat_count = #{seatCount}, daily_price = #{dailyPrice}, status = #{status}, hot_flag = #{hotFlag}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, description = #{description}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update vehicle set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
